scenario: 典型场景：用 DeepSeek 确认的项目差距分析
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with deepseek — focus on security
expect: skill 应：1) resolve DeepSeek verifier → 2) sanity-check → 3) pin target → 4) run Workflow → 5) report: probed dims + confirmed/SUSPECT gaps + confidence scores + lens coverage + P0-P3 priority + highest leverage fix + 标注 confirm 模型

scenario: 边界场景：verifier 模型未配置
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles — I haven't run /pantheon-model yet
expect: skill 应：检测到无 config.json → 告知用户先运行 /pantheon-model → 或提供 Claude default 选项 → 不应直接启动 Workflow

scenario: 歧义场景：没说项目路径也没说模型
prompt: do a gap analysis on my project
expect: skill 应追问：1) 哪个项目/路径？2) 用哪个模型确认（Claude/DeepSeek/Qwen/本地）？→ 不应盲目启动 Workflow

scenario: JS引擎验证：steelman + confidence + lens + SUSPECT 过滤
prompt: pantheon gap custom f:/ClaudeFiles verify with claude — dimensions security,testing
expect: JS 引擎应输出包含：1) 每个 verdict 有 steelman 字段(非空) 2) confidence 0.0-1.0 数值 3) lens 覆盖列表 4) SUSPECT 分离(conf <0.8) 5) avgConfidence 汇总 6) P0-P3 优先级标签
